name: reflection.approveCandidate
description: Approve a behavior candidate and optionally merge it into the behavior handbook.

candidate_id.description: The ID of the candidate to approve (e.g., cand_abc123).

reviewed_by.description: User or agent ID performing the approval.

merge_to_handbook.description: If true, create a new behavior entry in the handbook upon approval.

behavior_name.description: Override the behavior name when merging (defaults to candidate name).
